headline: Applied Optoelectronics Is Up 439% in 2026: Is It Outperforming Other Optics Stocks Like Lumentum and Coherent?
summary: Shares of Applied Optoelectronics (NASDAQ:AAOI) are up 20% in midday trading to around $190, snapping back hard from a Friday close of $158.41. The single-session pop lifts the stock’s year-to-date (YTD) 2026 gain to an impressive 439%. Meanwhile, Lumentum (NASDAQ:LITE) stock is up 7% to $914 and Coherent (NYSE:COHR) stock is roughly flat near $363. ... headline: China toughens rules on outbound investment after Meta-Manus contention
summary: China issued sweeping new ‌rules on Monday, ‌widening regulators' powers to scrutinise overseas ​deals involving Chinese investors, technology, data and national security, a month after ‌Beijing ordered ⁠the unwinding of Meta's acquisition of ⁠AI startup Manus. The rules, published by the ​State Council, ​or ​cabinet, will take ‌effect from July 1. One of the most significant requires authorisation for exports of restricted ‌Chinese goods, technologies, ​services or ​related ​data.

raw.headline: China toughens rules on outbound investment after Meta-Manus contention
raw.summary: China issued sweeping new ‌rules on Monday, ‌widening regulators' powers to scrutinise overseas ​deals involving Chinese investors, technology, data and national security, a month after ‌Beijing ordered ⁠the unwinding of Meta's acquisition of ⁠AI startup Manus. The rules, published by the ​State Council, ​or ​cabinet, will take ‌effect from July 1. One of the most significant requires authorisation for exports of restricted ‌Chinese goods, technologies, ​services or ​related ​data.

headline: Meta Faces Digital Services Act Scrutiny On Financial Scam Controls
summary: European consumer groups have filed coordinated complaints under the Digital Services Act against Meta Platforms, alleging insufficient action to curb financial scams on its services. The complaints call for a regulatory investigation and potential penalties from the European Commission, which could affect Meta's operations in a major market. Meta Platforms trades on the NasdaqGS under the ticker NasdaqGS:META, with a recent share price of about $632.51. For investors watching...
